summary: Liquidity Heatmap Feature Testing - All 20 backend API tests passed (2 skipped due to no weather markets during initial test). All frontend UI tests passed. New heatmap features working correctly: GET /api/markets/liquidity-heatmap returns correct shape with tiles, summary, token_count, tile_count. GET /api/markets/liquidity-scores returns token_id to score dict. After engine start, 25 weather market tiles displayed across 5 cities. Markets page shows dual-tab layout with Liquidity Heatmap and All Markets tabs. Tile detail dialog opens on click showing bucket breakdown. No regressions on existing pages (Overview, Arbitrage, Sniper, Weather, Settings) or market endpoints.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/markets/liquidity-heatmap has required fields: tiles, token_count, tile_count, summary
GET /api/markets/liquidity-heatmap summary has: avg_score, max_score, min_score, total_liquidity, total_volume_24h
GET /api/markets/liquidity-scores returns dict with token_id to score mapping
With engine stopped, heatmap shows empty tiles
After engine start, heatmap has tiles with weather market data
Weather trader health shows liquidity_scores_cached count
frontend_ui_tests: Stat cards: stat-total-markets, stat-heatmap-tiles, stat-total-volume, stat-avg-score
Empty state section with data-testid='section-heatmap-empty' shown when engine stopped
Market search input with data-testid='market-search-input' works
Markets table section with data-testid='section-markets-table' visible
Markets table with data-testid='markets-table' displays data
After engine start, heatmap section with data-testid='section-liquidity-heatmap' appears
25 heatmap tiles displayed across 5 cities (Miami, NYC, Atlanta, Dallas, Chicago)
Tile detail dialog with data-testid='tile-detail-dialog' opens on tile click
Dialog shows station_id, score, total liquidity, avg spread
Bucket detail rows with data-testid='bucket-detail-*' visible (9 rows)

success_rate.backend: 100% (20/22 passed, 2 skipped - no active weather markets at time of test)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Heatmap populates from live Polymarket weather markets when engine is running.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Liquidity Heatmap Feature fully implemented and tested. KEY FEATURES: (1) GET /api/markets/liquidity-heatmap returns {tiles: [], token_count, tile_count, summary: {avg_score, max_score, min_score, total_liquidity, total_volume_24h}} (2) Each tile has: condition_id, station_id, city, target_date, bucket_count, priced_buckets, avg_liquidity_score, total_liquidity, avg_spread, buckets[] (3) Each bucket has: label, token_id, mid_price, spread, liquidity, volume_24h, liquidity_score (4) GET /api/markets/liquidity-scores returns {token_id: score} dict for all markets (5) Liquidity scores are 0-100 range based on: spread (40%), depth (30%), volume (30%) (6) Markets page has dual-tab layout: 'Liquidity Heatmap' and 'All Markets' tabs (7) Heatmap shows weather markets grouped by city with color-coded score badges (DRY, SPARSE, THIN, MODERATE, GOOD, DEEP) (8) Clicking a tile opens detail dialog showing station_id, score, total liquidity, avg spread, and per-bucket breakdown (9) Empty state shown when engine is stopped (no weather markets discovered) (10) Engine must be started (POST /api/engine/start) and wait ~15s for market data to populate (11) Weather trader health endpoint includes 'liquidity_scores_cached' count (12) 5 cities supported: Miami (KMIA), New York City (KLGA), Atlanta (KATL), Dallas (KDFW), Chicago (KORD) (13) LiquidityService at /app/backend/services/liquidity_service.py with compute_liquidity_score() function (14) 12 unit tests in test_liquidity_service.py (all passing) (15) No mocked APIs - uses real Polymarket data

features_tested.liquidity_heatmap_summary: PASS - summary has avg_score, max_score, min_score, total_liquidity, total_volume_24h
features_tested.tile_structure: PASS - tiles have condition_id, station_id, city, target_date, bucket_count, priced_buckets, avg_liquidity_score, total_liquidity, avg_spread, buckets[]
features_tested.bucket_structure: PASS - buckets have label, token_id, mid_price, spread, liquidity, volume_24h, liquidity_score
features_tested.score_range_0_100: PASS - all liquidity scores in 0-100 range
features_tested.empty_state_engine_stopped: PASS - tiles empty when engine stopped
features_tested.heatmap_populated_after_engine_start: PASS - 25 weather market tiles after engine start
features_tested.frontend_heatmap_tab: PASS - Liquidity Heatmap tab with data-testid='tab-heatmap'
features_tested.frontend_table_tab: PASS - All Markets tab with data-testid='tab-table'
features_tested.frontend_empty_state: PASS - section-heatmap-empty shown when no tiles
features_tested.frontend_heatmap_section: PASS - section-liquidity-heatmap with city groups and tiles
features_tested.frontend_dialog_content: PASS - dialog shows station_id, score, liquidity, spread, bucket details
features_tested.frontend_search: PASS - market-search-input works in All Markets tab
features_tested.regression_markets_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/markets returns 200 with market list
features_tested.regression_other_pages: PASS - Overview, Arbitrage, Sniper, Weather, Settings all load
features_tested.unit_tests: PASS - 12/12 liquidity service unit tests pass
